commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of the global source-loading policy and normal landing validation.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression found; the diff adds no dependencies or workflow/script execution, and non-bundled plugin file boundary and hardlink checks remain in the path. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes plugin discovery to require compiled runtime output only for install-record-managed plugin directories, allows untracked global source checkouts to load TypeScript package entries, and updates focused tests, docs, and changelog coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible: global package discovery resolves openclaw.extensions before manifest/default fallback, and global TypeScript package entries without built JavaScript hit the compiled-runtime warning path.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of the global source-loading policy and normal landing validation.
